name: Baked Chocolate-And-Hazelnut Mousse
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup chopped hazelnuts, coarse or fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate with the Frangelico and heavy cream over low heat using a double boiler or microwave on low.
2. Remove from heat when melted.
3. With an electric mixer, beat egg yolks for about 3 minutes until thick and lemon-colored. Add sugar, flour, salt, butter, and hazelnuts. Mix well.
4. Add the chocolate mixture to the batter. Mix thoroughly.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff. Stir in 1/4 of the whites into the batter to lighten it.
6. Carefully fold in the remaining whites.
7. Spoon the mixture into 8 to 10 small fluted foil baking liners (paper cupcake liners in a muffin tin, a well-buttered muffin tin, individual ramekins, or individual soufflé dishes may also be used).
8. Bake at 400 degrees for 20 minutes.
9. Let cool slightly, then dust the tops with powdered sugar from a small sieve.
10. Serve in foil liners on dessert plates with small dessert spoons. Good warm or cool. Freezes well.
